title: Encountering the Grudge in Spring Under the Cherry Tree
Falling Petals and the Diverging Fates
Valley of Outside Measurements, Valley of the Dark Arts
The Twelve Generals of the Martial Fist
overview: A powerful new threat emerges when a violent and bold group of masked assailants attacks Tatsuma and his friends.

title: Purgatorial Howl
overview: While some of the gang hears details about the infamous Martial Fists, the rest of the team is learning about their new enemies the hard way - engaged in amazingly fierce battle!

title: Let's Change Ourselves From the Inside
overview: As Daigo and Kyouichi deal with strange events in the present, scenes from the past reveal painful moments that shaped them into the young men they’ve become.

title: The Fist Does Not Take Lives
overview: Kyouichi raises his new blade against Ukon. As the rest of the gang takes on swarms of mystical enemies, Tatsuma’s reality is turned upside down by shocking revelations regarding his past.

title: The Protecting Fist
overview: As the group tries to identify the one responsible for the recent madness, Tatsuma once again comes face to face with Marie - and she wants him dead.

title: Story of Byakko - A Mirthless Christmas Eve
overview: During the season of giving, Tatsuma is stunned beyond comprehension to find those closest to him brutally taken away by a murderous fiend known as Chaos.

title: Story of Genbu - Chaos
overview: With pain and madness in the winter air, Tatsuma must decide what kind of man he truly is when he gets his hands on the psychotic killer known as Chaos.

title: Story of Suzaku - Destruction Day
overview: Tatsuma’s friends are worried he’s spending too much time trying to help Ryuuji. But bigger concerns are on the horizon - an evil like no other is about to strike.

title: Story of Seiryu - Gathering Stars of Fate
overview: The world is in serious danger as Yagyu delivers death to many in an incredibly brutal battle. Unless Tatsuma’s team reaches unimaginable levels of power, the situation is truly hopeless.

title: Story of the Golden Dragon - Cherry Blossoms That Do Not Fall
overview: The citizens of Tokyo come together to rebuild, and the wounded begin to heal. The gang reflects on all that was lost and ponders the mysterious fate of Tatsuma.

title: Walk Onward, Children
overview: A glimpse into the past reveals the friendships and struggles along the path undertaken by Tatsuma and his powerful friends.

title: Romeo & Juliet
overview: Happy memories: Sometimes even those who fight to keep Tokyo safe from evil get a chance to live as normal high school kids.
